texto: All around me insisted that my doubts proved only my own ignorance and sinfulness; that they knew by experience they would soon give place to true knowledge, and an advance in religion; and I felt something like indecision.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maria Monk: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “All around me insisted that my doubts proved only my own ignorance and sinfulness; that they knew…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, knowledge, experience pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de experience.
